narrative:
Deerfield Twp township has 605 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.3 percentage points.
